## Summary

Fixes `STATE_SPLIT_BRAIN_DETECTED` failures caused by stale `progress.phase_status` left behind after watchdog rescue/retry operations. The stale-lease rescue reset the DB column `phase_status='queued'` but left `progress.phase_status='running'` from the prior `markRunning()` call ‚Äî the watchdog then detected the divergence and hard-failed the job, forcing users to manually retry an otherwise healthy evaluation.

## Root Cause

The claim RPC ‚Üí `markRunning()` flow sets both `phase_status` (column) and `progress.phase_status` (JSONB) to `'running'`. When a worker crashes after `markRunning()`, the stale-lease rescue resets the column back to `'queued'` but spread `...currentProgress` without explicitly overriding `progress.phase_status`. The watchdog's `isSplitBrainState()` detected the mismatch and failed the job.

## Corrective Action

- Stale-lease rescue: now sets `progress.phase` and `progress.phase_status` to match the column values
- Frozen-job rescue: now also syncs `progress.phase` (was already syncing `phase_status`)
- Admin retry route: reads current progress, patches `phase_status: 'queued'` into the JSONB
- New SQL migration: `admin_retry_job` atomically syncs `progress.phase_status` and `progress.phase`

## Mistake-Proofing

Added `classifySplitBrain()` that distinguishes:
- `'healable'`: only `progress.phase_status` diverges from column ‚Äî auto-fixable
- `'structural'`: `progress.phase` itself diverges ‚Äî requires hard failure

## Hardening

Watchdog now auto-heals trivial (healable) split-brain states BEFORE the hard-stop classifier can fire. Only structural divergence triggers a user-visible failure. Adds `split_brain_healed_at` timestamp to progress for audit trail.

## Scope

- `lib/evaluation/hardStopGovernance.ts` ‚Äî new `classifySplitBrain()` export
- `lib/evaluation/processor.ts` ‚Äî auto-heal loop + rescue path fixes
- `app/api/admin/jobs/[jobId]/retry/route.ts` ‚Äî progress JSONB sync
- `supabase/migrations/20260605010000_...` ‚Äî `admin_retry_job` RPC update
- `__tests__/lib/evaluation/hardStopGovernance.test.ts` ‚Äî 3 new tests

Does NOT touch: evaluation scoring, rendering, UI, or any pipeline output.

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

- The SQL migration changes the return type of `admin_retry_job` (adds `failure_code` column). Callers already access it from the row directly ‚Äî the retry route already reads `result.failure_code`.
- Auto-heal writes to `progress` JSONB on every scan tick where a healable split-brain is detected. This is bounded (only queued jobs with stale progress), not recursive.

---

No-Pipeline-Impact: Confirmed ‚Äî this fixes job state management only. No changes to evaluation scoring, LLM calls, or report rendering.
